settings.heading: East Village Buyers
settings.subheading: All items shipped within 2 business days.

settings.us_text: The price you see is the price you pay
settings.them_text: Up to 13.6% final value fee often baked into the price

settings.us_text: Every item authenticated in person by our team
settings.them_text: Buyer beware — counterfeits slip through regularly

settings.us_text: Fast, tracked shipping in 2 business days
settings.them_text: Seller-dependent — delays and no-ship scams happen

settings.us_text: Real local shop you can call, text, or walk into
settings.them_text: Slow ticket-based support, no one to actually talk to

settings.us_text: Fixed price — buy it now, no bidding wars
settings.them_text: Auctions can spike the final price above retail

settings.heading: Why Buy From East Village Buyers Instead of eBay?
settings.subheading: Skip the hidden fees, bidding wars, and counterfeit risk. Every item is authenticated in person by our team before it ever gets listed.

settings.quote: Sold my grandmother's gold bracelet here. They tested it in front of me and paid more than two other shops offered.
settings.author: Maria G.

settings.quote: Brought in Jordans and a Supreme box logo — quick authentication, fair cash offer, in and out in 20 minutes.
settings.author: Devon T.

settings.quote: Transparent, no pressure, and the best price I found for my watch after checking three other buyers.
settings.author: Sam R.

settings.question: Do I need an appointment?
settings.answer: No — walk-ins are welcome during store hours.

settings.question: How fast do I get paid?
settings.answer: Same day, on the spot, as soon as you accept the offer.

settings.question: What if my item isn't authentic?
settings.answer: We check every item by hand before making an offer, so you'll know right away.
